creator: bmah@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

markm and I have just updated the exmh2 port to use exmh-2.2.0, 
rather than exmh-2.1.X.  I think we've fixed a lot of bugs in exmh 
since this time...could you try the newer version of the port 
and see if this solves these problems?  Thanks!
